recommendations.title: Pokémon: Zoroark - Master of Illusions
recommendations.overview: Ash and his friends must stop a greedy media mogul from using the shape-shifting Zoroark to capture the time-travelling Celebi.

recommendations.title: Bionicle 2: Legends of Metru Nui
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: In the time before time, six unlikely Matoran find themselves transformed into mighty Toa. The new Toa Metru must prove themselves as true heroes, find the missing Toa Lhikan, and uncover a plot that threatens the heart of Metru Nui.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: My Little Pony: A New Generation
recommendations.overview: Equestria's divided. But a bright-eyed hero believes Earth Ponies, Pegasi and Unicorns should be pals — and, hoof to heart, she’s determined to prove it.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Aqua Teen Hunger Force Colon Movie Film for Theaters
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Action, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: An action epic that explores the origins of the Aqua Teen Hunger Force (better known as Master Shake, Frylock, and Meatwad,) who somehow become pitted in a battle over an immortal piece of exercise equipment.

recommendations.title: Daredevil vs. Spider-Man
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Crime, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Man and Daredevil team up to fight Kingpin.

recommendations.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Grudge of Edinburgh Part 2
recommendations.overview: Reunited with Lancelot for the first time since their tragic accident, Tristan must learn to conquer his inner demons in order to save his mother's life.

recommendations.title: See You Yesterday
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Drama, Adventure, Crime, Action
recommendations.overview: As two teen prodigies try to master the art of time travel, a tragic police shooting sends them on a series of dangerous trips to the past.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.
